LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS LEKU EDER, INC., CARLOS UGARTE, AND JEANETTE UGARTE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT. THE PROPOSED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS BROUGHT IN GOOD FAITH, IS COMPULSORY AND RAISES ISSUES CENTRAL TO THE COMPLAINT. THE MOTION IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT COOPERATE IN PROVIDING TO PLAINTIFF REASONABLE DISCOVERY AS TO THE NEW CLAIMS, NOTWITHSTANDING THAT DISCOVERY HAS CLOSED AND THAT DEFENDANT NOT OPPOSE A MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL SHOULD PLAINTIFF CHOOSE TO FILE ONE.
